name: Backup Verification
description: Scheduled backup verification that checks the latest backup status for all critical systems, performs a test restore on a random sample, and generates an AI-powered executive summary. Failed backups or failed test restores trigger an incident ticket and urgent notification. Successful verifications are logged for compliance audit trail.
author: T1 Agentics

required_integrations.name: Veeam Backup & Replication
required_integrations.reason: Query backup job status and perform test restore operations for verification

required_integrations.name: Jira
required_integrations.reason: Create incident tickets for failed backups or failed test restores

required_integrations.name: Slack
required_integrations.reason: Notify the infrastructure team of backup verification results

config.description: Runs every Monday at 6 AM to verify backup integrity across all critical systems
Retrieve the status of all backup jobs from the past 7 days including success, failure, and warning states
Check if any backup jobs failed in the past 7 days
Create a high-priority incident ticket for failed backup jobs requiring immediate attention
Send urgent Slack notification about failed backup jobs

config.script:
sample = random.sample(code_1.backup_jobs.filter(status='success'), min(3, len(code_1.backup_jobs.filter(status='success'))))
result = integration.execute('veeam', 'test_restore', { 'backup_ids': [b.backup_id for b in sample], 'mode': 'verify_only' })
config.description: Perform a test restore on a random sample of up to 3 successful backups to verify data integrity

config.additional_instructions: Generate a backup verification report: summarize job success/failure rates, test restore results, and any compliance concerns or recommendations.
config.description: AI-powered executive summary of the weekly backup verification results including test restore outcomes
Log the full backup verification report for compliance audit trail
